caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed in gold letters, and a gold chain. He wears large over-ear headphones and sits before a professional microphone on a boom arm. To his left, a white wall features a repeating logo that says "UNICORN HUSTLE" with five gold stars. Behind him, a blue sign reads "'Where BOSSES Talk!'". To his right, a black mug sits on the table with text that reads "THE TALK OUT". A small graphic in the lower-left corner contains the text "THE TALK OUT". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, facing slightly to the right. He maintains a slight smile and consistent posture, with minimal movement as he looks toward someone or something off-screen.
